description: Draws an arc or full circle using an animated compass instrument. The compass visually moves, adjusts, and traces the arc on the graph.
utility: Draw arcs and circles with compass animation — supports auto-adjust (move compass to center, set radius) or current-state (use compass as-is)

arguments.name: center
arguments.description: Center point for the compass (auto-adjust form). Omit to use compass's current position.

arguments.name: radius(r)
arguments.description: Radius value wrapped in radius(). Required for auto-adjust form.

arguments.name: range(start, end)
arguments.description: Arc sweep range in degrees. Omit for a full 360° circle.

alternates.description: Moves compass to center, sets radius, traces full circle
Moves compass to center, sets radius, traces arc from start° to end°
Traces full circle using compass's current center and radius
Traces arc from start° to end° using compass's current state

examples.scenario: Draw compass arc from point A with radius 5 for equilateral triangle construction
Draw second compass arc from point B to find triangle vertex
Compass arc with center and radius on geometry graph
